title: Implement caching system with Redis and memory adapters
description: Implement a caching system with 4 components: Redis cache adapter (src/cache/redisAdapter.ts), in-memory cache adapter with TTL support (src/cache/memoryAdapter.ts), cache manager (src/cache/cacheManager.ts), and cache middleware (src/middleware/cacheMiddleware.ts). The adapters should follow the existing Cache class patterns for TTL and LRU eviction, and the middleware should follow the rate-limiter middleware pattern using NextRequest/NextResponse.
existing_patterns: src/utils/cache.ts - Existing in-memory Cache class with TTL support, LRU eviction, and stats tracking; reuse its interface design and TTL/eviction logic
src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts - Middleware pattern using NextRequest/NextResponse with configurable keyResolver and options
src/utils/middleware.ts - Generic pipeline middleware pattern with Middleware<TContext> and ErrorMiddleware<TContext> types
